findings.evidence: Frontmatter includes fields not in VS Code prompt-file spec
findings.description: Non-standard frontmatter fields detected (agent, tools, model)
findings.recommendation: Document as intentional extensions or remove if not supported

findings.evidence: Only default location noted; no section/grid definitions
findings.description: Minimal output structure; missing explicit output declarations
findings.recommendation: Add explicit output structure with Executive Summary, Findings Grid, Recommendations Grid

findings.evidence: Only default location noted; no section/grid definitions
findings.description: Minimal output structure; missing explicit output declarations
findings.recommendation: Add explicit output structure with Executive Summary, Findings Grid, Recommendations Grid

findings.evidence: Uses conditional routing without explicit "Load and follow [SKILL.md]" pattern
findings.recommendation: Adopt explicit "Load and follow [SKILL.md](...)" pattern for consistency

findings.evidence: Skill referenced in template links, not in Required Actions section
findings.description: Implicit skill routing; not explicit in Required Actions
findings.recommendation: Add explicit "Load and follow [SKILL.md](...)" in Required Actions

findings.evidence: Triggers listed as prose; could be consolidated
findings.recommendation: Convert trigger list to table or single consolidated statement

findings.evidence: Sections 4-5 contain detailed narrative explanations (~100 words)
4 rules with prose explanation (~50 words each); repetitive structure
findings.recommendation: Convert to tight bullet list without narrative flourish

findings.evidence: 5 agents listed with individual prose descriptions (~50 words)
findings.description: Verbose agent list; could be more scannable
findings.recommendation: Convert to compact table for quick reference

findings.evidence: Phase sequence in code block (~50 lines with ASCII formatting)
findings.recommendation: Replace with markdown table or condensed list format (target: 20-30 lines)

findings.evidence: 3 separate script examples (60+ lines total) in "One-Command Wrapper" section
findings.description: Multiple PowerShell script examples; not essential in prompt body
findings.recommendation: Move detailed examples to skill references/README; retain single canonical example in prompt

findings.evidence: Sections list detailed file examples and descriptions (~80 lines)
findings.description: Detailed output templates inline; bloats prompt
findings.recommendation: Move output structure and examples to skill references; retain outline only

findings.evidence: ~200 lines of template code + instruction guidelines inline
findings.description: Full Markdown template embedded in prompt
findings.recommendation: Move complete template to skill references (SKILL.md references/template); link from prompt; reduce prompt to purpose + outline
